source_note: Authoritative monster primary-attack damage dice from Keeper Rulebook Ch.14 stat blocks. Verified by reading the 'Fighting NN%, damage X' line. Our monsters.json attacks[0] is the primary attack; its damage should match (with '+DB' normalized to '+damage bonus' equivalence). Only monsters whose rulebook Fighting damage is a clean dice expression are listed; special attacks (death, STR/CON drain, swallow, stun) are not comparable as a single die and are excluded.
